title: Cobblemon Alatia's Fakemon Pack
description: An addon for Cobblemon that adds fakemon from the Alatia Region.
body:
![Splashart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bbfceefa17fa4036f23e489c441901bb87cf999_0.webp)
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6c98387d9294b52ef2da483d5813b1776f4c1fe.png)

## This addon adds new **fakemon from the Alatia Region**! 

### **How to set custom starters set**
- Extract from the .zip file the "starter screen" folder (attached as additional file in each version page), inside it there are two files: main.json and starters.json
- Move your files in ".minecraft\config\cobblemon" (there's already a main.json, replace it with the new one)
- Enjoy it!

**NOTE:** 
- If you are using this addon with other ones with different starter set, you have to manually edit starters.json
- If you are using multiple addons, some evolution could be unavailable due to config conflict

#### There's a document where you can find every information you need [HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1llvUEyGHt168Yxad7I3MOiAbNV0Lntlvm1cYhjKlfmM/edit?usp=sharing)

### Common Q&A:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**If you need more help you can find me in the official Cobblemon Discord Server.**

**Q** : The world won't start with the addon, what's wrong?
**A** : If you are using the GEB version of my addon, make sure you also downloaded [Gravel's Extended Battles](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravels-extended-battles/gallery 'Title'), it's necessary since is used for custom types and moves.

**Q** : I added the addon in my world but doesn't work, what's wrong?
**A** : My addon is a mod (basically dapatack + resource pack pagacked as mod), so you just have to add it in your mod folder and it will work fine.

**Q** : I donwloaded GEB but I don't have any new types, what's wrong?
**A** : There are two versions of my addon (each of them for Fabric and NeoForge): One where you have the custom types (called "GEB") and one without (called "No GEB") where you don't need Gravel's Extended Battles to play it.

**Q** : The battle freezes and I can't do anything but run away.
**A** : This is a common issues caused by [Gravel's Extended Battles](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravels-extended-battles) with [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) or [Cobblemania](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemania) used together, please report this issue to the mod authors, my addon is not the issue.

**Q** : I'm using Xaero's Minimap and I would like to have icons of your fakemon.
**A** : You can use [E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons), this icon pack supports my addon.

**Q** : I have issue with the addon, I'm using **-insert modpack name-**.
**A** : I can't help with this because the issue could be anything.

**Q** : I need some information about a pokemon, can you help me?
**A** :**[HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1llvUEyGHt168Yxad7I3MOiAbNV0Lntlvm1cYhjKlfmM/edit?usp=sharing)** you can find every information you need

**Q** : I would like to add this addon in a modpack, can I add to it?
**A** : Yes, as long as you credit me. And please let me know since I like to look at some good modpacks.

**Q** : I would like to edit some data of your fakemon, how and can I do it?
**A** : Yes, you can edit the addon by making a new datapack to change some fakemon properties, such as stats, movepool and spawns. You can find the tutorial in the official Cobblemon Wiki.

**Q** : Hi, I'm an admin of **-insert server name-**, we would like to add your addon in **-insert some method to earn money from players-**
**A** : This addon is made to be free and no-profit, you can't block my content behind any sort of paywall (specifified in my CC license, NO COMMERCIAL USE) and mostly important: **no one is allowed to use this addon in public server without my permission.**

</details>


### Credits:
- Every fakemon from the Alatia Region is designed by [Doctor_X_Art (me)](https://www.instagram.com/doctor_x_art/)
- Aster Region starters by [Poke.Nova](https://www.instagram.com/poke.nova/)
- Frinx and Avalinx from the Impetia Region by [Cioxmon](https://www.instagram.com/cioxmon/)
- Iron Stalker is designed by [Nengland](https://www.instagram.com/_nengland_region_/) and [Aleskiin](https://www.instagram.com/aleskiin/)
- Every cry sound is made by me, Ganbare-Lucifer and [FloppaTyann](https://modrinth.com/user/FloppaTyann)

Cobblemon Alatia's Fakemon Pack © 2024 by Giuseppe D'Antonio (Doctor X) is licensed under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0

<details>
<summary>Guidelines</summary>

My CC license has some information regard what you may and not may do with my addon, but I'll prefer to specify a couple of additional things to avoid some greedy jackals:

You may:
- Include the pack into a private and public modpack WITH explicit permission and credit. (Provide a screenshot of the conversation as proof of my permission)

You may not:
- Use any of this content for profit. This include but not limited to:
  - Make server-exclusive skins and/or variant of fakemon inside this project.
  - A paywall of skins and distribution of fakemon via loot crates, keys, or any form of gambling and shiny boost. Each fakemon can be found naturally without any limitation.
- Redistribute this pack on different website than Modrinth and CurseForge.
- Create offensive content with my project and designs
- Use my content for GenAI.
</details>
